mustContain: Behold, He is coming with the clouds
His head and His hair were white
He had seven stars in His right hand
When I saw Him, I fell at His feet
He laid His right hand on me
mustNotContain: Behold, he is coming with the clouds
every eye will see him, including those who pierced him
his head and his hair were white
he had seven stars in his right hand
When I saw him, I fell at his feet
